modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access Reach due to sign-in error.

full_description_text:  
I cannot access Reach.  
I get a 400 error.  
Sign in failed.  
Error code is GENERAL_NONSUCCESS.
